zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Throckmorton於1480年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親Robert Throckmorton29歲，母親Katherine Marrow21歲。他於1512年與Katherine Vaux在英國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他於1513年登記服兵役。他在英國被列為member of parliament。他去世於1552年8月6日在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓享年72歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Throckmorton于1480年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，他的父亲Robert Throckmorton29岁，母亲Katherine Marrow21岁。他于1512年与Katherine Vaux在英国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他于1513年登记服兵役。他在英国被列为member of parliament。他去世于1552年8月6日在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓享年72岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Throckmorton was born in 1480, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Robert Throckmorton, was 29 and his mother, Katherine Marrow, was 21. He married Katherine Vaux in 1512, in England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 9 daughters. He registered for military service in 1513. His occupation is listed as member of parliament in England. He died on 6 August 1552, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Coughton, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Throckmorton est né en 1480, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Throckmorton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Katherine Marrow, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Vaux en 1512, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 9 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1513. Sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 6 août 1552, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Throckmorton 1480 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Throckmorton 29 und seine Mutter Katherine Marrow 21. Er hat 1512 in England Katherine Vaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er hat sich 1513 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als member of parliament in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. August 1552 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Coughton, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Coughton, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Throckmorton è nato il nel 1480 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Throckmorton, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Marrow, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Vaux nel 1512, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 9 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1513. La sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel England. Morì il 6 agosto 1552, nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Coughton, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Throckmortonが1480年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Robert Throckmortonは29歳，母Katherine Marrowは21歳であった。1512年にイギリスでKatherine Vauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年に兵役登録をした。イギリスでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1552年8月6日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで72歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Throckmorton(이)가 1480년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Throckmorton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Marrow(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1512년 영국에서 Katherine Vaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 영국에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1552년 8월 6일 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Throckmorton nasceu em 1480, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Throckmorton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Marrow, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Vaux em 1512, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1513. Sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1552, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Throckmorton родился в 1480 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Throckmorton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Marrow, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Vaux в 1512 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 9 дочерей. В 1513 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии member of parliament в местности Англия. Он умер 6 августа 1552 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Throckmorton nació en 1480, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Throckmorton, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Katherine Marrow, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Katherine Vaux en 1512, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 9 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1513. Su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Inglaterra. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1552, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
